title: centaurea uniflora var. helvetica
intro: Centaurea uniflora var. helvetica, also known as the one-flowered knapweed or Alpine knapweed, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family, Asteraceae. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic properties, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Centaurea uniflora var. helvetica include its potential to reduce inflammation, alleviate pain, and support the digestive system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are often used to promote overall well-being and to treat specific health issues.
